data.name: Error.NullValue
data.value: The specified value cannot be null.

data.name: Error.NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: Error.Unauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to perform this action.

data.name: Error.Forbidden
data.value: Access to this resource is forbidden.

data.name: Error.Conflict
data.value: A conflict occurred with the current state of the resource.

data.name: Error.BadRequest
data.value: The request contains invalid data.

data.name: Error.InternalServer
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: Error.ValidationFailed
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: Audit.CreatedAt
data.value: Created at

data.name: Audit.UpdatedAt
data.value: Updated at

data.name: Config.MissingConnectionString
data.value: The database connection string 'DefaultConnection' was not found in configuration.

data.name: Sales.OrderNotFound
data.value: The specified order was not found.

data.name: Sales.OrderNotPending
data.value: The operation is only allowed while the order is pending.

data.name: Sales.QuoteNotFound
data.value: The order does not have a quote yet.

data.name: Sales.QuoteAlreadyExists
data.value: The order already has a quote.

data.name: Sales.QuoteAlreadyAccepted
data.value: The quote has already been accepted.

data.name: Sales.QuoteAlreadyDecided
data.value: The quote has already been accepted or rejected.

data.name: Sales.InvalidQuoteCosts
data.value: Quote costs cannot be negative and the total must be positive.

data.name: Sales.InvalidQuoteProductionDays
data.value: The estimated production days must be a positive value.

data.name: Sales.PaymentNotFound
data.value: The specified payment was not found in the order.

data.name: Sales.PaymentAlreadyValidated
data.value: The payment receipt has already been validated.

data.name: Sales.InvalidPaymentAmount
data.value: The payment amount must be a positive value.

data.name: Sales.PaymentReceiptReferenceRequired
data.value: A receipt reference is required to register a payment.

data.name: Sales.OrderNotPayable
data.value: Payments can only be registered for accepted or in-production orders.

data.name: Sales.InvalidOrderStatusTransition
data.value: The order cannot transition from {0} to {1}.

data.name: Sales.InvalidOrderFilter
data.value: Filter orders by either customerId or carpenterId, not both.

data.name: Profiles.ProfileNotFound
data.value: The specified profile was not found.

data.name: Profiles.EmailAlreadyRegistered
data.value: A profile with the specified email address already exists.

data.name: Inventory.MaterialNotFound
data.value: The specified inventory material was not found.

data.name: Inventory.InvalidQuantity
data.value: Quantity must be greater than zero.

data.name: Inventory.InvalidMinimumStock
data.value: Minimum stock must be greater than or equal to zero.

data.name: Manufacturing.ManufactureOrderNotFound
data.value: No manufacture order was found for the specified sales order.

data.name: Manufacturing.StagesAlreadyDefined
data.value: The production stages for this order have already been defined and cannot be changed.

data.name: Manufacturing.StageNotFound
data.value: The specified stage was not found in this manufacture order.

data.name: Manufacturing.InvalidStageTransition
data.value: The stage status can only move forward: Pending -> InProgress -> Completed.

data.name: Manufacturing.OrderNotAccepted
data.value: Production stages can only be defined for orders that have been accepted by the carpenter.

data.name: Manufacturing.UnauthorizedStageUpdate
data.value: Only the carpenter assigned to this order can update its production stages.

data.name: Manufacturing.EmptyStageList
data.value: At least one production stage must be defined.

data.name: Manufacturing.InvalidStatusValue
data.value: '{0}' is not a valid stage status. Allowed values: Pending, InProgress, Completed.

data.name: Engagement.ConversationNotFound
data.value: No conversation was found for the specified order.

data.name: Engagement.MessageContentEmpty
data.value: The message content cannot be empty.

data.name: Engagement.TrackingIdNotFound
data.value: No order was found with the specified tracking id. It may be invalid or the order may have been cancelled.

data.name: Iam.InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid email or password.

data.name: Iam.EmailAlreadyRegistered
data.value: The specified email is already registered.

data.name: Iam.UserNotFound
data.value: The specified user was not found.
